hero.title: A complete AI assistant in under 1 MB
hero.sub: nllclw is a local-first assistant in readable Zig 0.16: OpenAI-compatible providers, local memory, a capability-gated tool loop, Telegram and WebSocket — one standalone binary, no provider SDKs, no Node, no Python.

primary.label: Release binary
primary.code:
# download the asset for your OS/CPU from
# github.com/nullclaw/nllclw/releases/latest
chmod +x nllclw
./nllclw --help

alts.label: Build from source (Zig 0.16.0)
alts.code:
git clone https://github.com/nullclaw/nllclw.git
cd nllclw
zig build --release=small
./zig-out/bin/nllclw --help

quickstart:
Run the setup wizard once, then talk to it.

```bash
./nllclw init              # setup wizard: provider, style, capabilities
./nllclw "what are you?"   # one-shot question
./nllclw                   # interactive terminal chat
./nllclw status            # quick health line
./nllclw doctor            # full diagnostics
```

features.title: Stdlib-only single binary
features.body: No runtime dependency on Node, Python, curl, a shell, or provider SDKs. The default build uses Zig stdlib adapters only.

features.title: Any OpenAI-compatible provider
features.body: openai, openrouter, or any compatible base URL — including local servers like Ollama on loopback. SSE streaming for direct chat.

features.title: Capability-gated tool loop
features.body: Filesystem, scheduling, web search and user-defined macro tools, each behind a plain config gate like NLLCLW_FILE_WRITE. Bounded rounds, bounded output.

features.title: Two-layer local memory
features.body: Recent transcript plus durable keyed facts, stored as JSONL in the user state directory. Nothing leaves your machine.

features.title: Six channels, one runtime
features.body: argv/stdin, interactive terminal, Telegram, token-protected WebSocket, heartbeat and daemon all share the same agent loop.

features.title: Shell compiled out by default
features.body: shell_exec exists only in an explicit -Dshell-tool=true build. The default binary cannot run shell commands at all.

note: Pre-1.0 with one release (v2026.6.1); binary size and test counts are the project's own snapshot, and config and CLI may change between releases.
